headline: At 63, He Wants to Take a Big Career Leap. The FedEx CEO’s ‘Just Say Yes’ Story Shows Why the Smarter Bet May Be Social Security.
summary: The FedEx CEO built a legendary career by saying yes to every opportunity that crossed his path. At 63, that same instinct could quietly wreck the one retirement move you cannot undo.
